mapper.insert: insert into student(name, gender, phone, degree, clazz_id, entry_date, graduation_date, id_card, image, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{degree}, #{clazzId}, #{entryDate}, #{graduationDate}, #{idCard}, #{image}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select c.name, count(s.id) as count from clazz c left join student s on c.id = s.clazz_id group by c.id, c.name order by count desc
